hero.headline: The Caribbean,
hero.lead: Vibrant activity & colouring books that turn island flags, birds, fruits and dinosaurs into hours of learning and creative play — made for curious kids ages 3–10.

books.title: National Flags of the Caribbean
books.description: Colour the flags that tell each island's story, with fun facts about every nation tucked alongside. A bright intro to geography and culture.

books.title: Dinos in the Caribbean
books.description: A T-Rex on the beach, a Triceratops in the rainforest. Colouring, riddles, word searches and crosswords meet prehistoric island fun.

books.title: Fruits of the Caribbean
books.description: From succulent mangoes to tangy five-fingers — a juicy adventure of colours, shapes and flavours through the region's most beloved fruits.

books.title: National Birds of the Caribbean
books.description: From the colourful Cuban Trogon to the majestic Scarlet Ibis — stunning illustrations, puzzles and facts that spark a love of nature.

peek.caption: Dinos in the Caribbean — facts + colouring
National Birds — meet & colour each bird
Dinos in the Caribbean — Jurassic crosswords
National Flags — every nation to colour

why.title: Create & colour
why.text: Activity-packed pages that build focus, fine motor skills and a whole lot of pride.

why.title: Sneaky learning
why.text: Real facts about flags, birds, fruits and dinos — geography and nature without the homework feeling.

why.title: Proudly Caribbean
why.text: Kids see their region celebrated — a meaningful gift for home, classroom or homeschooling.

why.title: Gift-ready
why.text: Perfect for birthdays and holidays. The bundle even comes with coloured pencils.

bundle.heading: The 4-Book Bundle
bundle.blurb: All four activity books in one fun, educational gift from the Caribbean — designed to keep kids engaged while they learn.
bundle.priceNote: Special bundle price · all 4 books + pencils

about.heading: Made by Caribbean people, for Caribbean kids
about.body1: Caribbean for Kids began with a simple idea: children deserve learning materials that look like home. What started as one colouring book has grown into a series that celebrates the flags, wildlife, flavours and wonder of the islands — all designed to make kids excited to learn.
about.body2: Every book is crafted to be fun first and educational always, so curiosity grows page after page.

reviews.quote: My daughter learned every Caribbean flag without realising she was studying. Beautiful, sturdy pages too.
reviews.author: — Sample Parent Review

reviews.quote: I use these in my Grade 1 class for culture lessons. The kids fight over who gets the dinosaur book!
reviews.author: — Sample Teacher Review

reviews.quote: Finally, activity books that celebrate where we're from. Bought the bundle for all three of my kids.
reviews.author: — Sample Parent Review

contact.address: Trini Smart Driver, Heartland Plaza, Endeavour
